title: Grenfell Tower: community update September 2025
body: "The government recognises that Grenfell Tower has a deep personal significance to those most affected by the tragedy and that all work at the Grenfell Tower site is sensitive. We are continuing to share information about the Tower, and listen to bereaved families, survivors and residents in the immediate community.   In this community update we provide information about how the government and its contractors are starting to take down Grenfell Tower with respect and care. This update is translated into 12 additional languages.  We are also providing more information about our monitoring of air quality, dust and noise levels. See the air quality and dust management plan and noise and vibration management plan. If you would like a translation of these plans please email GrenfellTowerSite@communities.gov.uk. "
